description.description: Detailed explanation of the policy set's purpose

metadata.description: JSON formatted metadata providing additional context

parameters.description: Configuration parameters required for policy execution

policy_definition_group.description: List of policy groups with metadata for categorization

policy_definition_reference.description: References to individual policies within the set

policy_definitions.description: Aggregate of all policies within the set definition

policy_type.description: Classification of the policy set, e.g., Custom or Built-in
